description: Returns real-time arrival and departure data for stops within a bounding box or radius centered on a specific location.

parameters.name: lat
parameters.description: The latitude coordinate of the search center.

parameters.name: lon
parameters.description: The longitude coordinate of the search center.

parameters.name: latSpan
parameters.description: Sets the latitude limits of the search bounding box.

parameters.name: lonSpan
parameters.description: Sets the longitude limits of the search bounding box.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: By default, returns the status right now. Can be queried at a specific time (milliseconds since epoch) for testing.

parameters.name: minutesBefore
parameters.description: Include arrivals and departures this many minutes before the query time.

parameters.name: minutesAfter
parameters.description: Include arrivals and departures this many minutes after the query time.

parameters.name: maxCount
parameters.description: The max size of the list of nearby stops and arrivals to return. Defaults to 250, max 1000.

parameters.name: routeType
parameters.description: Optional list of GTFS routeTypes to filter by (comma delimited) e.g. "1,2,3".

parameters.name: emptyReturnsNotFound
parameters.description: If true, returns a 404 Not Found error instead of an empty result.
